tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Revision of Days 51-59.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Revision of Days 51-59 का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He said that he was tired. She asked where I lived. You are coming, aren't you? Ram is the tallest. This is the most interesting book.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Revision of Days 51-59.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Revision of Days 51-59 का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I need a book. The sun rises in the east. If you work hard, you will succeed. If I had money, I would buy this house. If I had worked hard, I would have passed.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "मैं दो साल से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I have been living here for two years.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "Ram are the tallest."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Revision of Days 51-59.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Revision of Days 51-59 का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I wish I had more money. If only I had studied earlier. He told me to do this work. He sings well, doesn't he?
